title: Song of the Islands
writer: Joseph Schrank, Robert Pirosh, Robert Ellis
actors: Betty Grable, Victor Mature, Jack Oakie
plot: With his sidekick Rusty, Jeff Harper sails to paradisiacal tropical isle Ahmi-Oni to bargain on behalf of his cattle baron father for land owned by transplanted Irishman Dennis O'Brien. But Jeff falls in love with O'Brien's daught...
